name: This Chick at the Bar Is Almost Too Interested In Me...
description:
After a long day working at your company, you go to your usual watering hole to have a few drinks. You frequently drink at this establishment, but this time is different. A really cute girl approached you, saying she wants to keep you company. On top of that, it seems like she's VERY interested in your career... Is this your lucky day? Or is it something else entirely?

"You're being sexist, ASSHOLE!"

"I can stay just a bit longer... I'm almost done."

"Be gentle... Please?"

"Am I doing this right, sir..? Hehe..."
creator: Frosty_Dino69420
